title: actinocephalus camptophyllus
intro: Actinocephalus camptophyllus, also known as the 'curly head' or 'curly-leaved Actinocephalus', is a species of plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the reduction of fever and the treatment of respiratory infections, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. Actinocephalus camptophyllus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional remedies for its purported benefits.
